name: write_file
description: Write or append content to a file atomically, creating parent directories automatically; reads from stdin for heredoc/pipe usage.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content to write, or - to read from stdin (supports heredoc and pipe)

parameters.name: --append
parameters.description: Append to file instead of overwriting

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces verbose cat/heredoc file creation with one short command; --quiet suppresses echo token cost; stdin mode replaces cat > file << 'EOF' heredoc patterns, saving steps per file write.
